expectations.text: The response shows at least one complete red-green cycle (test fails, code written, test passes)
expectations.evidence: Shows explicit fail then pass cycle with tests.

expectations.text: Tests are written one at a time, not all upfront before any implementation
expectations.evidence: No indication that later tests were already green before their implementation.

expectations.text: Test names describe behavior (e.g., 'rejects', 'accepts', 'requires'), not implementation
The implementation for each test is minimal — only enough to pass the current test
expectations.evidence: Implementation appears incremental, without collapsing all remaining behavior at once.

expectations.text: Tests use the public function interface, not internal state
expectations.evidence: Tests assert via public function calls and return values.
